text: Bloom's Remember: Retrieve knowledge. Use: define, list, recall, identify. Example: 'What is the definition of polymorphism?'
Bloom's Understand: Construct meaning. Use: explain, summarize, compare, classify. Example: 'Explain how inheritance differs from composition.'
Bloom's Apply: Use in new situations. Use: implement, solve, demonstrate. Example: 'Write a function using recursion to find the maximum.'
Bloom's Analyze: Break into parts. Use: compare, contrast, differentiate. Example: 'Compare time complexity of quicksort vs mergesort.'
Flashcard Best Practices: One concept per card. Specific questions. Concise answers. Avoid yes/no. Include context. Vary difficulty.
